name: LIMELIGHT PAR L
comment: The LIMELIGHT PAR L engine features (12) 60W RGBL LED’s, capable of producing 8,213 lumens, provides high output for saturated color mixing, and the wide color spectrum and high CRI needed for the quality of light that key and fill light applications require. The newly designed optical system allows for a highly homogenized output with even color and light distribution throughout the beam. The fixture also features a wide zoom range from 5° to 40°. The smooth and responsive effect provides a well-defined narrow beam for mid-air effects and long throw distances as well as a wide and even wash coverage at shorter distances. The LEDs can be controlled in two separate zones for additional eye candy effects.
